parts.description:
The hidden native checkbox that mirrors the switch state for form submission and screen readers.

See https://base-ui.com/react/components/switch

A control that toggles between on and off.

See https://base-ui.com/react/components/switch

inputs.name: checked
inputs.description: The controlled checked state. Use with `(onCheckedChange)` or two-way `[(checked)]`.

inputs.name: defaultChecked
inputs.description: The state of the switch when it is initially rendered. Use when you do not need to control its state.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: When `true`, prevents the user from interacting with the switch.

inputs.name: form
inputs.description: Associates the switch with an external form by id.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: When `true`, the switch is focusable but cannot be toggled.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: When `true`, the switch must be on before the owning form can be submitted.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description:
Value submitted with the form when the switch is on.

Bound publicly as `[value]`; the TS member is named `submitValue` so the
directive can satisfy `RdxFormCheckboxControl`, whose contract reserves a
`value` member for `RdxFormValueControl` and forbids it on checkbox-style
controls.

inputs.name: uncheckedValue
inputs.description:
Value submitted while the switch is off. When omitted, the off state contributes no entry,
matching native checkbox behavior.

inputs.name: dirty
inputs.description: Whether the value changed from its initial value. Merged with internal tracking.

inputs.name: errors
inputs.description: Validation errors for the control. A non-empty list marks it invalid.

inputs.name: invalid
inputs.description: Whether the control is invalid. A non-empty {@link errors} list also marks it invalid.

inputs.name: pending
inputs.description: Whether async validation is pending. Pending controls publish neither `data-valid` nor `data-invalid`.

inputs.name: touched
inputs.description: Whether the control has been touched. A `model()` so Signal Forms can write it; set on blur/focus-out.

outputs.name: onCheckedChange
outputs.description: Event handler called when the checked state of the switch changes.

outputs.name: touch
outputs.description: Emits when the control is touched, notifying Signal Forms (stable Angular 22 contract).

parts.description:
The moving part of the switch that indicates whether it is on or off.

See https://base-ui.com/react/components/switch
